PowerShell($headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer mWw4WsFD8rKTXNRYJCi0H5hQtPm82JZkl09U3"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0/users/me" -Headers $headers; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $_.Exception.Message; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Projects\\SDC Centrailzed calender\\server" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer pcqWtWqlXGJfagKlXBaTCDiWMCgMAdFP0i7TA" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0/users/me" -Headers $headers; "✅ Direct API: $\($r.name\) \($\($r.email\)\)" } catch { "❌ Direct: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/smartsheet/status"; "✅ Server status: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "❌ $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/smartsheet/sheets"; "✅ Sheets found: $\($r.Count\) — $\($r | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { $_.name } | Join-String -Separator ', '\)" } catch { "❌ $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/smartsheet/sheets"; "✅ $\($r.Count\) sheets: $\(\($r | Select-Object -First 5 name\).name -join ', '\)" } catch { "❌ $\($_.Exception.Message\) | $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
